ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status For Filing Of Final Inventory And Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-06-2008 Continued To Mar-05-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status For Filing Of Final Inventory And Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-05-2007 Continued To Feb-06-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Don Dowling for the Executor.

Mr. Dowling reported that both claims had settled and requested a two month continuance for filing of the the final distribution. The matter was continued to February 6, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Julia Capozzoli.

Petition For Determination Of Entitlement To Estate Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-07-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: GERARD D. LAUNAY, APPEARING FOR DENG JUN JIAN, DON DOWLING, PETITIONERS
PARTIES HAVE GONE TO TWO TO THREE MEDIATION SESSIONS WITH NO RESULTS. THE ADOPTIONS ISSUES ARE NOT SETTLED. MAY POSSIBLY NEED TO GO TO TRIAL WHICH MAY TAKE TWO TO THREE FULL DAYS. THE DISCOVERY PORTION HAD NOT BEEN FINISHED. MATTER TAKEN OFF CALENDAR.
JUDGE:JOHN DEARMAN, REPORTER, CSR#11722, CLERK:LARRISA DOTSON, BALIFF:M. LOOS

Petition For Determination Of Entitlement To Estate Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-17-2007 Continued To Aug-07-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Determination Of Entitlement To Estate Distribution
Off Calendar May-09-2007 Continued To Jul-17-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Michael Valencia appearing for Roger Howe and Betty Fong, executors. Gerard Launay appearing for Yan Hau Howe, surviving spouse and also specially appearing for Peter Bressler for the son of the surviving spouse. Settlement reached with the wife. Her son is now 18 and he has filed his own claim. Deposition is schedule in mid-June. They are waiting for documents from China. Matter is continued to 7/17 for further status.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: A. Aguerre.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Verifications And Further Responses To Discovery
Off Calendar May-01-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Petitioner Yan Howe's motion to compel verifications.
The motion is moot

petitioner's motion to compel further responses to special interrogatories and request for production of documents
Granted in part and denied in part. The motion is granted as to special interrogatories #3, 5, and 6. Supplemental verified responses shall be provided within 10 days of notice of this order. The motion is moot as to the request for production of documents

Monetary sanctions in the amount of $460 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Petition For Determination Of Entitlement To Estate Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-14-2007 Continued To May-09-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gerard Launay (Counsel for Yan Hau Howe, Petitioner); Peter Bresler (Counsel for Deng Jun Jiang, Petitioner); Michael Valencia (Counsel for Roger Howe and Betty Fong, Co-Executors).

After a recitation of the procedural and factual history of the case (including the unsuccessful mediation), the Court continued the matter to May 9, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 for status of the litigation.

Judicial Officer: John Dearman, Judge; Court Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR# 11722; Bailiff: Deputy Teresa Fox; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Christine Nahnsen.

Petition For Determination Of Entitlement To Estate Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-31-2007 Continued To Mar-14-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Determination Of Entitlement To Estate Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-13-2006 Continued To Jan-31-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Mike Valencia appearing for executors. Peter Bresler appearing for Mrs. King Hai Howe. The court has not grant the petition for appointment of guardian ad litem. That issue is taken under submissiion. Mr. Breslet to submit an ex parte order appointment guardian ad litem. Parties are going to mediation on this petition. Matter is continued to a date after the mediation date is set. Mr. Bresler will call the clerk on the continuance date. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
